description: A hospital logistics Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) keeps crashing into an automatic sliding door during simulation tests because the door's physical parameters are wrong. Correct the kinematics and sensor parameters for the 'DEF AUTO_DOOR Robot' to ensure safe navigation. Set the 'DEF DOOR_SENSOR DistanceSensor' maxRange to 4.0 meters. For the SliderJoint, update the 'DEF DOOR_PARAMS JointParameters' maxStop to 1.5 meters, and configure the 'DEF DOOR_MOTOR LinearMotor' with a maxVelocity of 0.8 m/s and a maxForce of 150.0 N. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/hospital_door_fixed.wbt.
